CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Agency"), 'Agency', IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"AdTech and AdNetwork"), ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"B2B Software"), ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Logistics and Shipping"), ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Payments") ), "B2B Services", IF( ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Consulting and Market Research"), "Consulting and Market Research", IF( ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"CPG, Food & Beverages"), "CPG", IF( ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Financial services"), "Financial services", IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Equity Research"), ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Hedge Funds and Asset Management"), ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Investment Banking"), ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Investors"), ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c, "Private Equity and Venture Capital") ), "Investors", IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Classifieds"), ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Media and Entertainment") ), "Publishers / Classifieds", IF( ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Retail / eCommerce"), "Retail and eCommerce", IF( ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Travel and Hospitality"), "Travel", IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Automotive and Transportation"), ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"B2C Internet Services"), ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Education"), ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Gambling / Gaming"), ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Other"), ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Pharma and Healthcare"), ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Government Public Sector & Non Profit"), ISPICKVAL(Account.SW_Industry__c,"Telecom and Hardware") ), "Tier 2", "" ))))))))))
CustomField.label: Industry Cluster
